problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Mitochondrial. Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
